ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee works in */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the employee is currently active */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department responsible for the project */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client or stakeholder */,
  "milestones" TEXT /* JSON array to store project milestones */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_managerial" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role is managerial */,
  "hourly_rate" REAL /* Hourly rate for the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array to store role-based permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_entries" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time entry */,
  "hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the employee */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee logging hours */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the hours are logged against */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the hours were logged */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the time entry */,
  "overtime_hours" INTEGER /* Number of overtime hours worked */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who approved the time entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_entries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_entries_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_entries_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_entries_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee ended the role (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job position of the manager */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the manager oversees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project for which the report is generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "total_hours" INTEGER /* Total hours logged for the respective project */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who generated the report */,
  "details" TEXT /* JSON array to store additional details of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
